{{Infobox group
| name = Akura head family
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Akura head family]] members have deep purple eyes.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The elders of the [[Akura head family]] were present to support [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] could marry into the [[Akura head family]] if she wins.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Akura head family]] was the target of an assassination conspiracy.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“Kingdom of Seishen. You stand accused of conspiracy to assassinate members of the Akura head family.”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
